diagrams.title: Divide and Conquer Paradigm Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the recursive process of dividing problem, conquering subproblems, and combining solutions
diagrams.purpose: Understand the three-step process and recursive nature of divide and conquer algorithms

diagrams.title: Merge Sort Recursion Tree
diagrams.description: Tree structure showing how array is divided and merged at each level
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how O(n log n) complexity arises from log n levels each doing O(n) work

diagrams.title: Quick Sort Partitioning
diagrams.description: Shows in-place partitioning with pivot element
elements: Partition: elements < pivot left, > pivot right
Recursively sort left and right parts
diagrams.purpose: Understand in-place partitioning and how pivot reaches its final sorted position

diagrams.title: Closest Pair Divide and Conquer
diagrams.description: Geometric visualization of closest pair algorithm
diagrams.description2: Shows dividing line, strip region, and points to check
elements: Points in strip sorted by y-coordinate
diagrams.purpose: Understand how the combine step finds closest pair across dividing line
